data.body:
=== CHECKPOINT / HANDOFF (op-cert epic sonic-columned-sturgeon) ===
DELIVERED (2/6 children fully done — green Gerrit changes, tickets closed + completion-verifier signed):
 - 368c garlicky-deviant-kakapo -> change 649 (Verified+1, LLM-Review+1). rebar.opcert.v1 kind: opcert.py (sign/verify, subject binding, explicit-SHA era rule, two-phase verdict). Held-out TDD 12/12 + mutation-checked.
 - 42d1 urban-dihydric-trogon -> change 650 (Verified+1, LLM-Review+1). trusted_env.py (.rebar/trusted_environments.yaml loader, verify_required_environment vs pinned key, verify.require_environment config). Held-out TDD 9/9 (incl keyid-spoof defense) + mutation-checked.
 - Stack on gerrit: 649 <- 650, both green, NOT yet submitted (holding for epic close per skill).
 - 4214 unfair-mindless-halcyon: plan-review PASSED (certified vs HEAD), CLAIMED, then set BLOCKED.

BLOCKER (checkpoint reason): remaining 3 children (4214 verify, ee0b producer+AWS, 8f1d HMAC->opcert migration) all depend on a shared, decomposition-UNSPECIFIED keystone: how an op-cert DSSE envelope is STORED on a ticket + produced. Confirmed by code inspection: reducer/_processors.py::process_signature builds attestations[kind] from a FIXED field set (no envelope preserved), so storage needs a REDUCER change (every-ticket replay + compaction fold at :763 + cross-clone rollout) + a signing.py producer. Highest blast radius in the codebase.
Filed keystone ticket e4df-43bc-ec00-40e5 (behavioral-winsome-blacklemur) with 2 design options (A: extend SIGNATURE record [recommended]; B: new OPCERT event type). relates_to 4214/ee0b/8f1d.

DECISION NEEDED FROM OWNER: (1) confirm storage model (recommend Option A); (2) OK to proceed building the reducer change unattended, or hold. Also: OK to land 649/650 (foundation, self-contained, green) now, or hold for full-stack submit?
RESUMABLE: worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-opcert branch epic/opcert-sonic; venv active; this log = woodblock-condensed-racerunner (87fc-b9d0-ce8a-4838). Once keystone built: unblock 4214, implement (verify-opcert CLI mirrors verify_authorship.py, per-ticket walk, grandfather via terminal STATUS-event commit), then ee0b (library-mode HTTP + AWS IaC: Secrets Manager + SigV4, NOT KMS-Ed25519), 8f1d (contract), 6a89 (docs+ADR xref 0046).
